title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Lulu Hypermarket India Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Lulu Hypermarket India Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Lulu Hypermarket India Advisory Limited! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Lulu Hypermarket India Advisory Limited:
Lulu Hypermarket India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lulu Hypermarket India Advisory Limited!
